mcqs.question: Which of the following best describes a Public Cloud?

options.text: Cloud infrastructure owned by a single organization for its exclusive use
Cloud infrastructure shared by multiple organizations with similar requirements
Cloud infrastructure provided over the internet for public use
Combination of two or more different cloud types

mcqs.explanation: Public cloud services are provided over the internet to anyone who wants to use them, with resources like servers and storage owned and managed by the cloud service provider.

mcqs.question: What is a key characteristic of a Private Cloud?

options.text: Resources are shared among multiple organizations
It is always free to use
It is dedicated to a single organization with dedicated infrastructure
It can only be accessed from public locations

mcqs.explanation: A private cloud is dedicated to a single organization, either managed internally or by a third-party provider, offering enhanced control, security, and customization.

mcqs.question: A healthcare organization wants to store sensitive patient records on dedicated servers (for compliance) while using public cloud services for analytics and reporting. Which cloud deployment model best fits this requirement?

options.text: Public Cloud
Private Cloud
Community Cloud
Hybrid Cloud

mcqs.explanation: A hybrid cloud combines private and public cloud environments, allowing organizations to keep sensitive data in a private cloud while leveraging public cloud resources for analytics.

mcqs.question: Several banks in India want to share a cloud infrastructure to reduce costs while meeting regulatory compliance requirements specific to the banking sector. Which cloud deployment model is most appropriate?

options.text: Public Cloud
Private Cloud
Hybrid Cloud
Community Cloud

mcqs.explanation: A community cloud is shared by multiple organizations with common concerns (like regulatory compliance), making it ideal for industries like banking that share specific requirements.

mcqs.question: Which of the following is an advantage of Public Cloud over Private Cloud?

options.text: Higher security and control
Lower costs due to shared resources
Dedicated infrastructure
Complete data sovereignty

mcqs.explanation: Public clouds offer lower costs because infrastructure is shared among multiple users, reducing individual operational and maintenance expenses through economies of scale.

mcqs.question: A university research department needs to deploy a machine learning model that requires GPU instances only during semester project periods (3-4 months/year). What is the most cost-effective cloud deployment approach?

options.text: Deploy on dedicated Private Cloud infrastructure year-round
Purchase physical GPU servers in the department lab
Use Public Cloud with on-demand GPU instances during project periods
Build a Community Cloud with other universities

mcqs.explanation: Using public cloud on-demand instances allows the department to pay only for GPU resources when actually needed, avoiding year-round infrastructure costs for intermittent workloads.

mcqs.question: An organization runs latency-sensitive trading applications requiring sub-millisecond response times, along with batch processing jobs that can tolerate delays. Which deployment strategy would optimize both performance and cost?

options.text: Use only public cloud with reserved instances
Use only private cloud with on-demand scaling
Use private cloud for latency-critical workloads with public cloud for batch processing
Use community cloud shared with competitors in the same industry

mcqs.explanation: A hybrid approach allows the organization to maintain dedicated private infrastructure for performance-critical trading workloads while using cost-effective public cloud resources for flexible batch processing.

mcqs.question: According to the NIST cloud computing reference architecture, which statement is TRUE about the relationship between cloud deployment models and service models?

options.text: Private clouds can only offer IaaS
All cloud deployment models (Public, Private, Hybrid, Community) can implement all service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS)
Community clouds cannot provide SaaS
Public clouds exclusively provide SaaS

mcqs.explanation: Cloud deployment models represent where infrastructure resides, while service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS) define the service level—all deployment models can offer any service model based on provider implementation.
